description:
Legal record (#29) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 7v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 26 Adar 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #29) Delayed purchase agreement for the same property as the previous two entries, shares in an upper-story apartment (PGPID 40905, PGPID 40906). Raḥma and Yosef Ben-Barūkh make arrangements with Ḥabība, widow of Moshe Juwwānī/Jawwānī, such that in the 12 months following the 36-month rental agreement, they will have the opportunity to repurchase the property shares for the original price of 3,300 medin. During the course of their residence Raḥma and Yosef commit to maintain and renovate the apartment according to its needs. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#29) בפנקס בית דין רבני בקהיר (BL OR 6356, דף 7v); בעברית; כ"ו אדר ה'תמ"ג (1683 לספירה); הסכם רכישה מושהית של אותו נכס (PGPID 40905-40906); רחמה ויוסף בן-ברוך יוכלו לרכוש חזרה את הנכס ב-3,300 מֶדין בתוך 12 חודשים לאחר תום 36 חודשי השכירות
